channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: AGO22 overgrown along a significant stretch, 30th June
item.description:
AGO22 overgrown along a significant stretch
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Lawns, Gotherington, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 30th June
item.description:
CWPH 400 x 300 x 62mm Road Closure (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 30th June
item.description:
Give and take 28 days 28 day carriage way pothole 700x300x40mm plus x3 NSD (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 30th June
item.description:
Give and take temporary footway closure 28 day please cut back overgrown hedge to safe approx 10 meters x3 high meters (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 30th June
item.description:
3 way stop and go plus temporary footway closure 28 day cut off tree branches approx 4 meters high x 5 meters hanging over footway obstruction to bus stop (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 30th June
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 30th June
item.description:

item.title: Cut the grass in the children’s play area, 30th June
item.description:
The grass is too long for toddlers and small children in the benhall play area. It’s messy and itchy and the long grass means that kids cannot see the cracks in the ground causing tripping hazards. Please can the grass in the children’s play area be cut asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Draycot Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 30th June
